headline: Jim Cramer Returns To ConocoPhillips (COP) As Oil Prices Touch $96
summary: We recently published Jim Cramer Didn’t Hold Back On SpaceX’s IPO & Discussed These 12 Stocks. ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer. ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) is an oil and gas exploration and production company. The shares are up by 32% over the past year and 24% year-to-date. Mizuho discussed ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) […]
